text:
to locate the information you need, please contact ResDAC.
| SAS Name | Variable Name | 
|---|---|
| BENE_ID | Encrypted CCW Beneficiary ID | 
| PRACTICE_ID | Model-Assigned Practice ID | 
| PRACTICE_NAME | Name of Practice | 
| TIN | Practice's Taxpayer Identification Number | 
| UNIQUE_PATIENT_ID | Unique Model-Assigned Patient ID | 
| NPI | Provider's National Provider Identifier | 
| VISIT_DATE | Patient Visit Date | 
| FOLLOWUP_ATTESTATION | Practitioner's Attestation to Follow-up | 
|
